commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed right now because no definite code defect remains; contributor-supplied real behavior proof is the blocker.; Cleared: The diff only touches Codex app-server source and tests, with no dependency, workflow, credential, release, or supply-chain surface. (sha=ef0169f0d7308f9f496303afbb2584e8d86b60c2)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an early Codex app-server accepted-prompt transcript mirror using the existing mirror identity, context session key, and suppression guard, plus regression tests for split session keys and suppressed user persistence.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main builds the Codex user prompt in the final projector result and mirrors it only after turn completion. I did not run the live Feishu/Codex/WebChat reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed right now because no definite code defect remains; contributor-supplied real behavior proof is the blocker.

target.title: fix(codex): mirror accepted prompts early
target.body:
## Summary
- Mirror the accepted Codex app-server user prompt as soon as the turn has a stable id.
- Use the context session key for the early transcript mirror so WebChat/Control UI session attribution is not replaced by the sandbox session key.
- Reuse the existing `turnId:prompt` mirror identity and thread-scoped idempotency so the final transcript mirror dedupes the prompt.
- Add regression coverage for split `sessionKey` and `sandboxSessionKey` behavior.

Fixes #83528

## Proof
- Head: `9bfea0ac9e7ab3e83f20bec5c291bd04f0df8bf9`.
- PR diff contains only:
  - `extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts`
  - `extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts`
- Formatting: `git diff --check` passed.
- Targeted regression passed:
  - `CI=1 NO_COLOR=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts --run --reporter=dot --testNamePattern "mirrors the accepted prompt before Codex turn completion using the context session key"`
- GitHub checks passed on the refreshed head:
  - Workflow Sanity
  - OpenGrep — PR Diff
  - CI
  - CodeQL Critical Quality

## Real behavior proof

- behavior: The Codex app-server run attempt mirrors the accepted user prompt into the session transcript as soon as the turn has a stable id, before Codex turn completion. When `sessionKey` and `sandboxSessionKey` differ, the early mirror uses the context session key for transcript write hooks and transcript update attribution. The final transcript mirror still dedupes the same user prompt through the existing `turnId:prompt` identity and thread-scoped idempotency key.

- environment: Clean isolated local worktree at PR head `9bfea0ac9e`.

- steps:
  1. Rebuilt the PR branch from current `origin/main` in an isolated worktree.
  2. Reapplied only the prompt-mirroring production change and its regression test.
  3. Updated the early mirror to pass `contextSessionKey` instead of `sandboxSessionKey`.
  4. Added regression coverage where `sessionKey` is `agent:webchat:session-1` and `sandboxSessionKey` is `agent:sandbox:session-1`.
  5. Verified the PR diff contains only the two intended Codex files.
  6. Ran `git diff --check`.
  7. Ran the targeted regression test.
  8. Force-pushed the cleaned branch to `fix/issue-83528`.
  9. Verified GitHub checks passed on the refreshed head.

- evidence:

      Targeted regression:
      RUN v4.1.7 /home/rev/projects/openclaw-pr-84652-clean

      Test Files 1 passed (1)
      Tests 1 passed | 214 skipped (215)
      Duration 6.40s

      Verified PR files:
      extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts
      extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts

- observedResult: The accepted user prompt is written to the transcript before Codex turn completion. The split session-key regression verifies the early write is attributed to the context session key, not the sandbox session key. After final mirroring, the transcript still contains only one user row for that prompt. The PR is clean, mergeable, and green on GitHub.

- notTested: Did not run a full live Codex app-server turn against a real model provider. Did not capture WebChat/Control UI visual proof. Did not test concurrent prompt mirroring from multiple Codex threads.
target.author: jason-allen-oneal

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
